name: Rio Grande Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 can ROTEL Diced Tomatoes and Green Chilies (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender.
2. Pulse on/off for 30 seconds or until thoroughly blended.
3. The dressing is best when used the same day.
4. Makes about 1 3/4 cups dressing.
